## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages / stack traces.

## Environment

- Area: [ ] apps/api  [ ] apps/web  [ ] packages/shared  [ ] infra
- Browser / OS (for web):
- Deployment: [ ] local  [ ] preview  [ ] production

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain the problem.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant.
